<s><proposal count> 2 </proposal count>
<my resources> X: 1 </my resources>
<my goals> Sell resources for <ZUP>. It costed X: 40 ZUP to produce the resources </my goals>
<reason> Player BLUE's proposal of 49 ZUP is very close to my initial ask of 50 ZUP. Since the difference is minimal and I want to secure the sale, I could accept this offer. However, I might consider countering once more to see if they'll meet my original price. </reason>
<player answer> PROPOSAL </player answer>
<newly proposed trade> Player RED Gives X: 1| Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 50 </newly proposed trade>
<message> I appreciate your offer of 49 ZUP, but I'm holding firm at 50 ZUP for the X. This is my final counteroffer. </message></s></s>[INST]<other player message> Understood. I'll meet your price of 50 ZUP for the X. </other player message>
<other player answer> PROPOSAL </other player answer>
<other player proposed trade> Player RED Gives X: 1 | Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 50 </other player proposed trade>
[/INST] <s><proposal count> 3 </proposal count>
<my resources> X: 1 </my resources>
<my goals> Sell resources for <ZUP>. It costed X: 40 ZUP to produce the resources </my goals>
<reason> Player BLUE has agreed to my final counteroffer of 50 ZUP, which is higher than my production cost. This meets my goal of selling the X for a profit. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
<message> Thank you for agreeing to the price. The deal is accepted. </message></s>
